forgotSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a verification code to reset your password.
resetSubtitle: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
successSubtitle: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errorInvalidOtp: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
errorOtpExpired: Verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
errorResetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
errorServer: Server error. Please try again later.
passwordMinLengthError: Password must be at least 8 characters
invalidRequest: Invalid verification request. Please try again.
tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
